name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and lost sales. We provide an inventory forecasting algorithm instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem_solved: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts or overstocking.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts or overstocking.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and lost sales. We provide an inventory forecasting algorithm instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
